name: Fall River Five Cents Savings Bank
description_short: BankFive is a Massachusetts and Rhode Island-based community bank offering checking, savings, home loans, and financial learning services with a focus on local customer relationships.
description_long:
Fall River Five Cents Savings Bank operates under the brand name BankFive and serves customers across Massachusetts and Rhode Island. The institution emphasizes community banking with a stated mission to use experience, innovation, and collaboration to serve customers, employees, and the communities it operates in. The bank positions itself as a long-standing financial institution rooted in local relationships and values.

BankFive offers a comprehensive range of retail banking services including checking accounts, savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), and a children's savings product called Lucky Piggy Savings. The bank provides a Family of Home Loans for mortgage borrowers and home equity products (HELOC). Additional services include financial education through their Five SENSE Financial Learning program, retirement planning assistance, college savings planning, foreign currency purchase, and career opportunities within the organization. The website indicates 100% deposit insurance coverage.

The bank distinguishes itself through emphasis on personal relationships and customer service quality. Website testimonials consistently highlight staff professionalism, individual staff member recognition, and the bank's willingness to go beyond standard service. The institution markets itself as treating customers "like family" and having staff who are "thorough and genuinely concerned" about solving customer issues. Their approach emphasizes the continuity of their past experience with contemporary innovation.

As a regional community bank, BankFive lacks the digital-first features and potentially competitive rates of larger national banks or online-only institutions. The website provides limited specific information about account features, interest rates, fees, or detailed loan terms. Customers seeking extensive online functionality or nationally competitive rates may find better options elsewhere. The bank's strength appears to be in personal service and local community presence rather than cutting-edge digital banking or rate leadership. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Debit card services with fraud monitoring
pros: Consistent customer testimonials praising staff professionalism and personalized service across multiple branches
Offers 100% deposit insurance as explicitly stated on website
Comprehensive loan offerings including home loans, HELOCs, and family home loan programs
Financial education program (Five SENSE Financial Learning) available to customers
Multiple service locations across Massachusetts and Rhode Island with named staff recognition in reviews
Quick fraud alert resolution and debit card replacement services noted in customer feedback
Children's savings product (Lucky Piggy Savings) for family banking
Mortgage lending support noted as making home-buying process easier per customer testimonials
cons: Website provides no specific information about interest rates, APYs, or account fees for comparison
Limited details on digital banking capabilities, mobile app features, or online account management
Regional bank with presence only in Massachusetts and Rhode Island, not nationally available
Website testimonials indicate occasional fraud alert issues requiring staff intervention
No information provided about minimum deposit requirements, account minimums, or qualification criteria

contact.address: 79 N Main St, Fall River, MA 02720

best_for: Massachusetts and Rhode Island residents seeking personalized, relationship-based community banking
Homebuyers needing mortgage lending with local support and guidance throughout the process
Families looking for accessible banking with educational programs and children's savings products
Customers prioritizing staff expertise and local branch access over online-only banking platforms
diagnosis: BankFive is best for Massachusetts and Rhode Island residents who value personalized customer service and local banking relationships over competitive rates and digital-first features. The main caveat is that the website provides insufficient rate and fee information to assess whether this bank's pricing is competitive with regional or national alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 79 N Main St, Fall River, MA 02720
